untestedRules.usage: The focusable wrapper of the component should be considered a `textbox`. That signifies it has a value that could be submitted.
Attribute is rendered only when the ColorPalette is disabled.

rule.usage: The implicit orientation for the `role="slider"` must be removed.

violations.element: <div class="k-hsv-draghandle k-draghandle" role="slider" aria-label="Color well with two-dimensional slider for selecting saturation and lightness" aria-valuetext="Saturation 50, Lightness 50" style="
